tools.name: configure
tools.description: Inject the API key the app needs before it can serve traffic. Must be called once per container restart; the runtime keeps every other endpoint at HTTP 503 until this succeeds.

api_key.description: Secret API key. Stored in the per-app sealed volume; SHA-256 of the value is committed to the per-container RA-TLS leaf at OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.65230.3.5.1.

tools.name: protected
tools.description: Returns 200 with the configured API key length once the app has been configured; HTTP 503 otherwise.
